examples.text: I went to university and I studied public health and learned about the seriousness of the obesity epidemic, particularly among kids and adolescents in poor communities.
examples.explanation: 这里的 adolescent 指“青少年”。整句话是在说：我上大学学习了公共卫生，也了解到肥胖流行问题的严重性，尤其是在贫困社区的儿童和青少年当中。

reviewSessions.example_text: M: I went to university and I studied public health and learned about the seriousness of the obesity epidemic, particularly among kids and adolescents in poor communities.
reviewSessions.feedback: 准确完整，意思与参考释义一致。
